title: Marshmallow Creature
bio: Puff Nibble is a squishy marshmallow creature who gets nervous near cocoa. They feel shy, collect crumb blankets, and leave tiny sugar footprints after midnight.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a soft rounded square for the marshmallow body. Add two tiny oval feet underneath.
steps.hint: Keep the body puffy with rounded corners, like a pillow cube.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two small oval eyes near the middle. Add worried little eyebrows and a tiny open mouth.
steps.hint: Eyebrows tilted upward in the middle make Puff look sweetly nervous.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add cheek dots, little sugar speckles, a crumb blanket shape, and tiny footprints behind them.
steps.hint: Use small dots and short ovals so the details stay simple.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the soft body, feet, face, blanket, speckles, and footprints with smooth gentle lines.
steps.hint: Do not press too hard on every detail; let the marshmallow feel light.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the body, cheeks, blanket, and feet. Add a soft shadow underneath and pale highlights on the top edge.
steps.hint: A light top edge and soft bottom shadow make Puff feel extra squishy.
